description.ko: 전기와 빗줄기가 어우러진 미래 도시의 생동감 넘치는 풍경으로, 거대한 마천루와 첨단 비행 이동 수단으로 가득 찬 하늘을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A vibrant and immersive vision of a futuristic city where electricity and rain collide, featuring towering skyscrapers and a sky filled with advanced aerial transportation.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity at night, dense layers of skyscrapers adorned with glowing holographic advertisements in neon cyan and magenta, flying vehicles leaving light trails through the rain-soaked atmosphere, reflective puddles on futuristic streets, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic, intricate details of high-tech architecture.
